metadata.description: Entries where ADA value is plausible but could not be auto-verified. Category A (403): real URL blocked — needs institutional access. Category B (EMA/trial): needs human to open PDF or PMC full text.

entries.ada_value_display: 4.8% (1 mg/kg dose), 0.7% (10 mg/kg dose, potentially underestimated)
entries.verification_note: Evidence chain AI-generated from real URL/PMID anchor; ADA value extraction not independently verified. Human must cross-check source page for exact immunogenicity figure.
entries.suggested_action: Open URL with institutional access and search Section 6.2 Immunogenicity
